aws.name: CodePipeline configured for CI/CD
aws.expected: At least one active CodePipeline exists for SDLC automation
aws.remediation: Configure AWS CodePipeline to implement automated CI/CD workflows.

aws.name: CodeBuild projects configured with security scanning
aws.expected: CodeBuild projects include security scanning in build specs
aws.remediation: Add security scanning steps to CodeBuild project build specifications.

azure.name: Azure DevOps pipelines configured
azure.expected: Active Azure Pipelines exist for CI/CD automation
azure.remediation: Configure Azure Pipelines to implement CI/CD workflows.

gcp.name: Cloud Build triggers configured
gcp.expected: Cloud Build triggers exist for automated builds and deployments
gcp.remediation: Configure Cloud Build triggers for CI/CD automation.

aws.name: Security groups restrict unused ports
aws.expected: Security groups only allow required ports and protocols
aws.remediation: Review and restrict security group rules to only necessary ports.

azure.name: Network Security Groups restrict unused ports
azure.expected: NSGs only allow required ports and protocols
azure.remediation: Review and restrict NSG rules to only necessary ports.

gcp.name: VPC firewall rules restrict unused ports
gcp.expected: Firewall rules only allow required ports and protocols
gcp.remediation: Review and restrict VPC firewall rules to only necessary ports.

aws.name: API Gateway endpoints documented
aws.expected: API Gateway REST APIs have descriptions documenting functions
aws.remediation: Document all API Gateway endpoints with descriptions of their functions.

azure.name: API Management services documented
azure.expected: API Management services have documented APIs and operations
azure.remediation: Document all Azure API Management APIs with their functions and purposes.

gcp.name: API Gateway configurations documented
gcp.expected: API Gateway APIs have documented configurations and functions
gcp.remediation: Document all Cloud API Gateway APIs with descriptions.

aws.name: CodeCommit repositories configured with version control
aws.expected: Source code managed in CodeCommit repositories with branch protection
aws.remediation: Store all application code in CodeCommit with branch protection rules.

aws.name: Infrastructure as Code stored in version control
aws.expected: CloudFormation templates managed via version control systems
aws.remediation: Manage all CloudFormation templates in version control systems.

azure.name: Azure Repos configured with branch policies
azure.expected: Azure Repos have branch policies enforcing reviews and checks
azure.remediation: Configure branch policies on Azure Repos requiring pull request reviews.

gcp.name: Cloud Source Repositories configured
gcp.expected: Source code managed in Cloud Source Repositories
gcp.remediation: Store application code in Cloud Source Repositories with appropriate access controls.

aws.name: CodeBuild projects include test stages
aws.expected: CodeBuild projects include automated testing phases
aws.remediation: Add automated testing stages to CodeBuild project specifications.

azure.name: Azure Pipelines include test stages
azure.expected: Azure Pipelines include automated test stages
azure.remediation: Add automated testing stages to Azure Pipeline definitions.

gcp.name: Cloud Build includes test steps
gcp.expected: Cloud Build configurations include automated test steps
gcp.remediation: Add automated testing steps to Cloud Build configurations.

aws.name: CodeGuru or third-party SAST integrated
aws.expected: CodeGuru Reviewer or SAST tools integrated in CI/CD pipeline
aws.remediation: Integrate Amazon CodeGuru Reviewer or other SAST tools into build pipeline.

azure.name: Security DevOps extension configured for SAST
azure.expected: Microsoft Security DevOps or SAST tools integrated in pipelines
azure.remediation: Install and configure Microsoft Security DevOps extension for static analysis.

gcp.name: Cloud Build integrated with SAST tools
gcp.expected: Cloud Build includes SAST scanning steps
gcp.remediation: Integrate static analysis security testing tools into Cloud Build.

aws.name: Systems Manager inventory tracks software versions
aws.expected: Systems Manager tracks installed software and versions for EOL detection
aws.remediation: Enable AWS Systems Manager inventory to track software versions.

aws.name: Inspector scans for EOL software packages
aws.expected: Inspector findings include EOL software detections
aws.remediation: Enable Amazon Inspector to scan for end-of-life software packages.

azure.name: Microsoft Defender for Cloud detects EOL software
azure.expected: Defender for Cloud assessments include EOL software detection
azure.remediation: Enable Microsoft Defender for Cloud to detect unsupported software.

gcp.name: Security Command Center detects EOL software
gcp.expected: SCC findings include EOL and unsupported software detections
gcp.remediation: Enable Security Command Center to detect end-of-life software.
